title: Cracker's Wither Storm Mod: Plasticised
description: It's a texture pack that goes with the plastic texture pack Java port that makes everything in the mod fit in with the plastic texture pack!
body: I hope you enjoy check the neccicary things for it to work! You can do whatever you like with it as long as you link back here for it and if you modify it or use it in a video I'd like it if you were to credit me for making it!
